diff --git a/django/contrib/auth/base_user.py b/django/contrib/auth/base_user.py
index 3a4a64ee19..377b613444 100644
--- a/django/contrib/auth/base_user.py
+++ b/django/contrib/auth/base_user.py
@@ -134,6 +134,7 @@ class AbstractBaseUser(models.Model):
         return salted_hmac(
             key_salt,
             self.password,
+            self.get_email_field_name(),
             # RemovedInDjango40Warning: when the deprecation ends, replace
             # with:
             # algorithm='sha256',

diff --git a/django/contrib/auth/validators.py b/django/contrib/auth/validators.py
index b4878cfd45..18bf4f79d6 100644
--- a/django/contrib/auth/validators.py
+++ b/django/contrib/auth/validators.py
@@ -7,7 +7,6 @@ from django.utils.translation import gettext_lazy as _
 
 @deconstructible
 class ASCIIUsernameValidator(validators.RegexValidator):
-    regex = r'^[\w.@+-]+$'
     message = _(
         'Enter a valid username. This value may contain only English letters, '
         'numbers, and @/./+/-/_ characters.'
@@ -17,7 +16,6 @@ class ASCIIUsernameValidator(validators.RegexValidator):
 
 @deconstructible
 class UnicodeUsernameValidator(validators.RegexValidator):
-    regex = r'^[\w.@+-]+$'
     message = _(
         'Enter a valid username. This value may contain only letters, '
         'numbers, and @/./+/-/_ characters.'
